summary: Position card shows USD P&L + ROE% together (e.g. +$0.88 (26.30%)) — fix validated on live mainnet position.

before_after_pairs.label: Position card — USD P&L and ROE% both visible
before_after_pairs.note: Both before and after show the fixed state (fix was already merged to main via PR #41696 before this branch was created). ROE% (26.30%) visible alongside +$0.88 USD P&L.

videos.note: Video recording unavailable on this machine (ScreenCaptureKit permission issue). Screenshots provide equivalent evidence.
